suite.name: Basket

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=basket_api, url=http://localhost:5001, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Add Valid Book To Basket

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/clear path_url=/basket/clear headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket path_url=/basket headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/item path_url=/basket/item headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '30', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"book_id": "BK001", "qty": 1}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket path_url=/basket headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: And the basket total is greater than
GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket path_url=/basket headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: AC-001: A book in stock is added to the basket

test.name: Cannot Add Out Of Stock Book

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/clear path_url=/basket/clear headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: When the customer tries to add book
Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/item path_url=/basket/item headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '30', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"book_id": "BK003", "qty": 1}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the response status should be
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: AC-002: Out-of-stock books cannot be added

test.doc: AC-003: A book in the basket can be removed

kw.name: When the customer applies discount code
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/discount path_url=/basket/discount headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '18', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"code": "SAVE10"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the basket total includes a 10 percent discount
GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket path_url=/basket headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

test.name: Invalid Discount Code Is Rejected

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/clear path_url=/basket/clear headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5001/basket/discount path_url=/basket/discount headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '19', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"code": "BOGUS99"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the response status should be
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: AC-005: Unrecognised codes return an error

suite.doc: Acceptance tests for the Shopping Basket API Run with: robot features/basket.robot
